criterion: Stop concurrent Kotlin LSP instances from racing — either serialize them via a mux or document a stable single-instance policy.

acceptance_signals.description: Reproduction recorded: two project activations on the same Kotlin source tree spawn rival kotlin-lsp instances
Decision recorded: serialize behind a mux, or hold a single shared instance per workspace
Cold-start circuit-breaker covers Kotlin path (no infinite retry on startup failure)
Integration test covers concurrent activation of two Kotlin projects
